SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.view.theme

Interface LevelTheme

All Known Implementing Classes:
AncientTempleTheme, FutureWarfareTheme, InterstellarTheme, MagicCastleTheme, SunsetCityTheme
public interface LevelTheme
Defines visual assets for themed levels. Enables distinct level experiences with custom backgrounds and color schemes.

This interface belongs to the View layer as it only contains presentation-related data (images, colors) and does not affect game logic or physics.

Author:
Dong, Jia.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getAccentColor()
    Gets the accent color for this theme in CSS format.
    String
    getBackgroundImage()
    Gets the background image resource path.
    String
    getPrimaryColor()
    Gets the primary color for this theme in CSS format.
    String
    getSecondaryColor()
    Gets the secondary color for this theme in CSS format.
    String
    getThemeName()
    Gets the display name for this theme in the UI.

  • Method Details

    • getThemeName

      String getThemeName()
      Gets the display name for this theme in the UI.
      Returns:
      the theme name (e.g., "Ancient Temple")

    • getBackgroundImage

      String getBackgroundImage()
      Gets the background image resource path.
      Returns:
      the path to the background image resource

    • getPrimaryColor

      String getPrimaryColor()
      Gets the primary color for this theme in CSS format.
      Returns:
      the primary color (e.g., "#D4AF37")

    • getSecondaryColor

      String getSecondaryColor()
      Gets the secondary color for this theme in CSS format.
      Returns:
      the secondary color (e.g., "#8B4513")

    • getAccentColor

      String getAccentColor()
      Gets the accent color for this theme in CSS format.
      Returns:
      the accent color (e.g., "#FFD700")
